title: Uber利用OpenAI助力智能赚钱与快速叫车
title_en: Uber uses OpenAI to help people earn smarter and book faster
summary: Uber利用OpenAI驱动AI助手和语音功能，帮助司机更智能地赚钱，乘客在全球实时市场中更快地叫车。该集成利用OpenAI的模型优化Uber平台的匹配和交互效率。Uber leverages OpenAI to power AI assistants and voice features that help drivers earn smarter and riders book faster across a global real-time marketplace, using OpenAI's models to optimize matching and interaction efficiency on the Uber platform.
